label: Run Code Interactively
command: clear && file="${ZED_FILE}" && ext="${file##*.}" && if [ "$ext" = "py" ]; then if [ -f shell.nix ]; then nix-shell --run "python $file"; else python "$file"; fi; elif [ "$ext" = "js" ]; then node "$file"; elif [ "$ext" = "sh" ]; then bash "$file"; elif [ "$ext" = "c" ]; then gcc "$file" -o /tmp/run_c && /tmp/run_c; elif [ "$ext" = "cpp" ]; then g++ "$file" -o /tmp/run_cpp && /tmp/run_cpp; elif [ "$ext" = "html" ]; then xdg-open "$file"; fi && echo '' && zsh -i
